reference: CRATES HAD REALLY BEEN INVITED IN ORDER TO WIN HIM OVER TO THE QUEEN'S CAUSE BUT CHARMING FAIR HAIRED NICO HAD BEEN COMMISSIONED BY THE CONSPIRATORS TO PERSUADE HIM TO SING ARSINOE'S PRAISES AMONG HIS PROFESSIONAL ASSOCIATES
text: crates had really been invited in order to win him over to the queen's cause but charming fair harrod nico had been commissioned by the conspirators to persuade him to sing arsinoe's praises among his professional associates
